notableEvents.label: Andrés Giménez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Giménez grounds out to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Ernie Clement to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: George Springer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: George Springer grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Brandon Valenzuela out at 2nd. George Springer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Aaron Judge GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. J.C. Escarra out at 2nd. Aaron Judge out at 1st.
